# Steffan Harris

> Personal site of Steffan Harris, a software engineer specialising in React and TypeScript, committed to enhancing user experiences.

## Pages

- [Home](https://steffan.lol/): Overview, skills, and contact details
- [Work Experience](https://steffan.lol/work-experience): Roles at Sainsbury's, Vodafone, Red Technology, and Bee Design Ltd
- [CV](https://steffan.lol/Steffan_Harris_CV.pdf): Downloadable CV (PDF)
